name: John Malecki
oneLine: Former NFL offensive lineman (Steelers) turned full-time woodworker and YouTuber based in Pittsburgh.
bio: John Malecki is an ex-NFL offensive lineman who, after retiring from professional football, co-founded Studio AM with former teammate Baron Batch and posted woodworking projects to Facebook and Instagram before launching his YouTube channel. The channel has grown to roughly 1.2 million subscribers, where he builds for clients full-time and produces tool reviews, challenge builds, and home renovation projects. He also runs Shop Shades, a safety glasses brand.
style: personable, talk-to-camera shop vlog with athlete-physique build sequences and collab guests
notable: 'Lord of the Rings' inspired door build
frequent collabs with other woodworking YouTubers
